mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO stopover_file (file_id, stopover_id, is_representative) VALUES
( #{dto.imageId}, #{dto.stopoverId}, #{dto.isRepresentative} )
mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.walking_path_id, s.stopover_comment, s.stopover_category, s.address, sf.file_id, s.create_datetime FROM stopover s LEFT JOIN stopover_file sf ON s.id = sf.stopover_id WHERE s.id = #{stopoverId} ORDER BY sf.is_representative DESC

SELECT s.id, s.walking_path_id, s.stopover_comment, s.stopover_category, s.address, sf.file_id, s.create_datetime FROM stopover s LEFT JOIN stopover_file sf ON s.id = sf.stopover_id WHERE is_deleted = false AND s.walking_path_id = #{walkingPathId}
mapper.update:
UPDATE stopover SET
address = #{address},
stopover_comment = #{comment},
stopover_category = #{typeValue},
update_datetime = #{updateDatetime} WHERE id = #{stopoverId}
mapper.select: SELECT file_id FROM stopover_file WHERE stopover_id = #{stopoverId}
